message.content:
@startuml
title TCPClient::connectToServer(string ipAddress, int port)

actor UC1 as UC1
participant TCPClient as TCPClient
participant clientStructure as clientStructure

UC1 -> TCPClient : connectToServer(ipAddress, port)

note over TCPClient
create a socket
end note

TCPClient -> TCPClient : socket_ = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);

opt [socket_ == -1]
  TCPClient --> UC1 : return -1 (socket create fail)
end

TCPClient -> clientStructure : clientStructure()

note over clientStructure
objeckt of
sockaddr_in
end note

TCPClient -> TCPClient : clientStructure.sin_family = AF_INET;
TCPClient -> TCPClient : clientStructure.sin_port = htons(port);

note over TCPClient
linking ipAddress to clientstructure
using AF_INET standart
end note

TCPClient -> TCPClient : inet_pton(AF_INET, ipAddress.c_str(),\n&clientStructure.sin_addr);
TCPClient -> TCPClient : connectRes = connect(socket_, (sockaddr*)&clientStructure,\nsizeof(clientStructure));

opt [connectRes == -1]
  TCPClient --> UC1 : return -1 (faild to connect)
end

TCPClient --> UC1 : return 0 (connected)

destroy clientStructure
@enduml
